title: FactSet's (FDS) Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: FactSet's (FDS) fourth-quarter fiscal 2022 earnings surge year over year, driven by higher revenues.

title: Down 12.7% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why FactSet (FDS) Looks Ripe for a Turnaround
text: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for FactSet (FDS) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

title: FactSet Research (FDS) Misses Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: FactSet (FDS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -3.69% and 1.46%, respectively, for the quarter ended August 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: FactSet: Don't Miss This Consistent Grower At A Discount
text: FactSet is an attractive investment proposition from a growth perspective, given the company's strong financial and key performance metrics. The company's capital distribution programs are sustainable and should provide key support to shareholder value.
